Submit a Request for Proposal

For enterprise AI strategy engagements beyond our standard consulting sessions, we scope custom implementations with not-to-exceed pricing and full P4D3-structured deliverables.

What to Include in Your RFP

To scope your engagement accurately, please provide:

  • Organization overview — Industry, size, and current technology stack
  • Objective — The specific AI outcome you are trying to achieve
  • Current state — Existing AI initiatives, data infrastructure, and governance posture
  • Constraints — Timeline, budget range, compliance requirements, data sovereignty requirements
  • Decision criteria — How you will evaluate proposals
  • Stakeholders — Key contacts and decision-makers involved

What You Receive

Every scoped engagement includes:

  • Current State Analysis — audit of your existing infrastructure and AI readiness
  • Future State Goal — clearly defined architectural vision
  • Gap Analysis — precise evaluation of what bridges are required
  • Strategic Roadmap — phased deployment blueprint
  • Not-to-exceed pricing — complete financial predictability

Custom engagements typically range between $5,000 and $100,000 depending on scope, dependencies, and complexity.

Submit Your RFP

Send your RFP directly to:

james.szmak@elevationary.com

We respond to all RFPs within 2 business days. For time-sensitive inquiries, book a 15-minute introductory call first.

Or Start with a Consultation

Not ready for a full RFP? A consultation is the fastest path to a scoped proposal.

  • 15-Minute Introductory Session — $99
  • 60-Minute AI Strategy Session — $399
  • 90-Minute Enterprise Deep-Dive — $598
